title: Bee's Nectar
description: Improvement on honey with new items and blocks
body:
Bee's Nectar mod adds new blocks and items related to the Buzzy Bees update 

**Features:**
- **Crystallized Honey**
- **Crystallized Honey Block**
- **Foods mixed with honey**
- **Decorative Blocks**
- **Sticky Potion that lets you climb walls**

More features coming soon!
